description: Mesh scenery registry for the GLB/OBJ -> Open Cloud -> in-game pipeline. Each kind:'mesh' entry's `source` points at a .glb or .obj (OBJ is converted to GLB at upload); `make assets-upload` records the asset id in asset-ids.json and MeshSceneryService places it at runtime. See assets/PIPELINE.md and doc/003_binary_asset_management.md. Code-built primitive scenery lives in SceneryService, not here.

assets.description: Four-floor apartment block at 2x (22-stud storeys, footprint x +/-59.5, z -16.5..-174): spans the plaza square and the north-center lot, bridging the east-west street with a ground-level underpass under the west wing. All four floors walkable (same plan per floor, spiral stair); main entrance (doormat) on the south face toward the spawn forecourt; players spawn inside the ground-floor entree.
Stylized cloud-canopy tree. scatter:true — uploaded by the pipeline but placed by ForestService, which clones it across the Home island's grass (Config.Forest).
Suburban neighbor home (NW square, faces the plaza).
Suburban neighbor home (NE square, faces the plaza).
Suburban neighbor home (W square, faces the plaza).
Suburban neighbor home (E square, faces the plaza).
Suburban neighbor home (SW square, faces the plaza).
Suburban neighbor home (SE square, faces the plaza).
Flat cartoon phone art for the cellphone HUD (PhoneMenuController). 2D UI image, not world scenery.
